title: The Tortoise and the Hare
description: A classic moral story for early learners.

segments.text: A fast hare laughs at a slow tortoise.
The tortoise smiles and says, “Let us have a race.” The race begins.
The hare runs fast and is far ahead.
He decides to take a nap under a tree.
The tortoise walks slowly but never stops.
When the hare wakes up, the tortoise is already at the finish line.
Slow and steady wins the race.

transcript: A fast hare laughs at a slow tortoise. “You are so slow!” he says. The tortoise smiles and says, “Let us have a race.” The race begins. The hare runs fast and is far ahead. He decides to take a nap under a tree. The tortoise walks slowly but never stops. When the hare wakes up, the tortoise is already at the finish line. Slow and steady wins the race.
